# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: contributorRoleAssignment
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments@2020-08-01
    apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    location: 'Global'
    properties:
      scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}'
      roleDefinitionId: /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roles/Contributor
      principalId: '{servicePrincipalObjectId}'

  - name: contributorScope
    type: Microsoft.Resources/deployments@2020-06-01
    apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    location: 'Global'
    properties:
      mode: Incremental
      expression: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments", "contributorRoleAssignment")]'

  - name: resourceGroupScope
    type: Microsoft.Resources/deployments@2020-06-01
    apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    location: 'Global'
    properties:
      mode: Incremental
      expression: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments", "contributorRoleAssignment")]'

  - name: userAssignedManagedIdentity
    type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities@2020-05-01
    apiVersion: '2018-11-30'
    location: 'Global'
    properties:
      userAssignedIdentities:
        {
          '[resourceId("Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities", "user-assigned-id")]': null
        }

  - name: servicePrincipal
    type: Microsoft.Identity/platformServicePrincipals@2021-01-01
    apiVersion: '2018-02-01'
    location: 'Global'
    properties:
      additionalProperties:
        objectId: {servicePrincipalObjectId}
      managedIdentity:
        userAssignedIdentities:
          - user-assigned-id

  - name: roleAssignment
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments@2020-08-01
    apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    location: 'Global'
    properties:
      scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}'
      roleDefinitionId: /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roles/Contributor
      principalId: '{servicePrincipalObjectId}'

  - name: deploymentScope
    type: Microsoft.Resources/deployments@2020-06-01
    apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    location: 'Global'
    properties:
      mode: Incremental
      expression: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments", "roleAssignment")]'

  - name: policyDefinition
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/policyDefinitions@2020-05-01-preview
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    location: 'Global'
    properties:
      policyType: Custom
      mode: All
      policyRule:
        if:
          - not in: [string('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks'), string('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts')]
